In the first match, he landed 120 power punches. This number is the starting point of the series, and it sets the foundation for the subsequent matches. This number is not only a measure of his physical strength but also a reflection of his fighting style and strategy.

This increase demonstrates that the boxer is adapting his strategy and is able to deliver more power punches in each match.

This is a significant number, as it shows that the boxer is able to maintain his power level and even exceed it in the third match. Therefore, the total number of power punches the boxer landed across all three matches is 450.
